source_name: US Census ACS 2024 5-year and 2024 Census Gazetteer counties
eligible_population_definition: ACS B01001 female population age 50-74, summed from B01001_040E through B01001_046E.
population_points_note: County-centroid testing inputs weighted by eligible_population; replace with finer reviewed population points before publication.
rurality_index_note: Inverse min-max scaling of Census population density per square mile within NC counties.
high_risk_index_note: Min-max scaling of ACS households with no vehicle available within NC counties; provisional access-vulnerability proxy.
